## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, optimization strategies, and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance remains stable week-over-week; new branding blogs published](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Conversion rate from blog to capabilities pages is 1.26%; case studies getting most clicks](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Plans to optimize SaaS content and improve sidebar conversions on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [New MedTech content cluster planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Webstacks moving to ClickUp for project management; directory designs in progress](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Performance stable week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Design-related blogs (press, resource pages) seeing fewer clicks, offset by other content](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [5 new branding blogs published; 5 more coming tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Current blog-to-capabilities page conversion rate: 1.26%](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Case studies getting most clicks (e.g., Calendly)](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GA4 report created to track user journey from blog to capabilities pages](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### Blog Optimization Strategies

  - [Need to update CTAs on high-traffic blogs (e.g., SaaS pricing page design)](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Plan to create report showing which blogs drive most traffic to solutions/capabilities pages](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Identify patterns in successful blogs (topic, CTAs, placement) for replication](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Consider adding slide-ins or banners for high-intent visitors](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Goal: Increase conversion rate from 1.3% to 2.5% with optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### Sidebar Conversion Improvements

  - [Current sidebar focus on email subscription (20-30 signups/month)](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Proposal to better utilize sidebar space for driving MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Options include linking to capabilities pages, case studies, or downloadables](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Will test different options on top-traffic blogs and expand based on results](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

### Upcoming Content Plans

  - [New MedTech content cluster planned](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Devon to share keywords and content brief by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Continuing with branding cluster; Aida to incorporate more Webstacks case studies](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

### Project Management Update

  - [Webstacks moved from Notion to ClickUp](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [GrowthX team to be added as users for better visibility and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

### Directory Design Progress

  - [Designs for listing and details pages near completion](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Plans to move body text component to listing page for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [CTAs to be added for relevant services on specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Devon to share MedTech cluster keywords and brief](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Devon to share recent brand-related client stories](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Aida to create new GA4 Explore report with all blog data](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Jacob to research pagination vs. load more for directory listings](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Webstacks to add GrowthX team to ClickUp](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Webstacks to finalize and share directory designs for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/kjr1mBC9VN5zw7GdEc4HZdREPJWxVMps?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
